title: potentilla × diversifolia var. ranunculus
intro: Potentilla × diversifolia var. ranunculus, also known as Silver Buffaloberry or Silver Buffalobery, is a deciduous shrub with white flowers that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × diversifolia var. ranunculus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for use in herbal medicine, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
